## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (if applicable).

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so reviewers can reproduce.

## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Changes follow the project's code style
